name: Broccoli Linquine
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the broccoli florets until tender.
2. Cook linguine according to package directions (9 oz if using fresh).
3. While cooking the linguine, combine egg yolk, pepper, thyme, oregano, and Romano cheese in a bowl.
4. Once cooked, drain the linguine and add it to the broccoli.
5. Toss the drained pasta and broccoli with the cheese and butter mixture.
6. Mix in the sour cream until well combined.
7. Serve immediately.
